---
title: ""
toc: false
page-layout: full
---

::: {.page-banner}
# About Me
Business analyst blending finance, biology, and data science
:::

::: {.page-content}

::: {.about-grid}
::: {.about-stat}
[2+]{.stat-number}
[Years in finance]{.stat-label}
:::
::: {.about-stat}
[MS]{.stat-number}
[Business Analytics @ BU]{.stat-label}
:::
:::

::: {.about-body}
I earned my Bachelor of Science in Biology from Quinnipiac University, where I developed a strong analytical mindset and attention to detail. After graduating, I pivoted into the finance field and began my career as a Project Accountant at WSP.

Since joining WSP, I have advanced to a Project Accountant Lead role, where I manage complex financial projects, lead and mentor team members, and support the Finance Director for the Building Structures division across the country.

Currently, I am pursuing a Master of Science in Business Analytics at Boston University, where I am expanding my technical skill set and gaining expertise in data-driven decision-making. My goal is to continue growing within the business and finance space while leveraging analytics to drive smarter financial strategies and insights.
:::

::: {.skills-section}
## Technical skills

::: {.skills-grid}
[Python]{.skill-badge} [R]{.skill-badge} [SQL]{.skill-badge} [Machine Learning]{.skill-badge} [Oracle]{.skill-badge} [Excel]{.skill-badge} [Power BI]{.skill-badge}
:::
:::

:::
